title: Grain Contraction Just One of Several Potential Concerning Headwinds
section_path: Grain Contraction Just One of Several Potential Concerning Headwinds
section_path_text: Grain Contraction Just One of Several Potential Concerning Headwinds
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, last week ended up seeing a very large jump in spot cargo volume reported in the market. In fact, it was the largest volume reported all year. Spot cargo volume is historically volatile and can wax and wane significantly during any given week.
